response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and experience with JVM languages (Java, C#) and enterprise tooling, but lacks explicit focus on Java/Kotlin IDE development, Spring ecosystem, or JVM tooling. Their background is more aligned with full-stack, web, and systems programming, with limited evidence of IDE internals or language tooling contributions.
strengths: Strong Java experience (C#, legacy Java IDE work at National Instruments)
Proven track record in enterprise software development and tooling
Demonstrated ability to work on complex systems and large-scale codebases
concerns: No direct experience with Kotlin, Spring, or enterprise Java frameworks mentioned
Lack of IDE internals or language tooling experience (key requirement)
Primary expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang rather than JVM ecosystems
